abilities.description: Nocturnal: If you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.703964b8d02355b8]{Resupply} at night by sending your owl to hunt, take +2 momentum on a hit. When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.2f2ba4090b22a122]{Enter the Fray} +wits against an ambush in darkness, add +1 and take +1 momentum on a hit.
Sage: When you leverage your owl’s secret knowledge to perform a ritual, add +1 or take +1 momentum on a hit (decide before rolling).

Embodying: When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.0cfcd6fbaf6135d0]{Face Death}, take your owl’s health as +momentum before you roll. On a hit, mark 1 tick on your bonds legacy track.
